headline: MEXC Launches Bittensor TAO Staking for 10M Users

article.title: MEXC adds Bittensor TAO staking for its global user base
article.summary: The integration with validator Yuma gives millions of MEXC users access to Bittensor, an AI-focused blockchain whose ecosystem now spans 128 specialized subnets.

headline: Bitcoin Surges 5% Towards $9,000 Amid Market Turmoil

article.title: Bitcoin nears seven-week high as stocks ignore Iran strikes, Trump 10% tariff plans
article.summary: Bitcoin and crypto joined US stocks in brushing off US-Iran war escalation and the threat of fresh trade tariffs before the end of the month.

headline: Chipmakers Surge 3%, Lift Global Stocks Higher

article.title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that’s powered the bull market has more room to run.

headline: Emerging Stocks Surge 2% as Currencies Gain

article.title: High-Yielding Emerging-Market Currencies Gain, Stocks Rebound
article.summary: Most emerging-market currencies advanced on Tuesday, bolstered by a rebound in risk appetite as investors looked past the latest developments in the Middle East and focused on carry trades instead.
